reviews.comment:
Muy limpio el lugar. Es espacioso atrás hay un lugar abierto con plaza mesas y sillas como para pasar el rato. Los baños impecables

(Translated by Google)
The place is very clean. It's spacious, and in the back there's an open area with a plaza, tables, and chairs, perfect for relaxing. The bathrooms are spotless.
